title: /me action messages
description: Check for /me prefix in user input and format the outgoing ClearMessage so recipients render it as '* alice waves' instead of 'alice: /me waves'. Requires a new ClearMessage variant or a convention in the text field.
close_reason: implemented in cli/src/commands.rs: /who, /me (CTCP ACTION), /cat (4KB text file), /! (shell stdout), /alias (contacts.json persistence), /clear; Ctrl+L handled natively by rustyline
